AiDiagnosis.title:
Smart Diagnosis in

Your Pocket
AiDiagnosis.subtitle: Simply point your camera at a structural issue or equipment malfunction. Our AI instantly identifies the problem, estimates costs, and suggests the right specialist.
AiDiagnosis.feature1Desc: Get results in seconds with 99% accuracy on common structural defects.
AiDiagnosis.feature2Desc: Receive immediate repair cost estimates based on current market rates.
AiDiagnosis.feature3Desc: Automatically connect with the 3 nearest top-rated professionals for the job.
